title: Construct landscape features using concrete
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Construct landscape features using concrete demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare work

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Check quantity and quality of materials

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check quantity and quality of materials.

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery required for construction work and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for construction work and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for construction work and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise environmental impacts of proposed concrete works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise environmental impacts of proposed concrete works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise environmental impacts of proposed concrete works.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish profiles to conform to nominated tolerances.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate site according to site plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare subsoil by removing all debris, vegetable matter and topsoil to provide a solid foundation for concrete.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install drainage systems according to plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install drainage systems according to plans and specifications.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install form work on site in a manner that will ensure it remains rigid during concrete pouring operations and allow for ease of dismantling without damage to concrete?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install form work on site in a manner that will ensure it remains rigid during concrete pouring operations and allow for ease of dismantling without damage to concrete.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place and compact sub-base material to required finished levels.

pcs.text: Complete preparation of site according to type of structure or feature to be constructed
